evidence.summary: Repository lock pins Palworld target, full UE4SS commit and the reviewed Native DLL digest.
A prior compatible process loaded dev36 and established Bridge; inventory consumption remains experimental and lacks the production persistence gate.

combinations.notes: Experimental target only. Steam build is not pinned and the Native inventory write capability has not passed the controlled save-stop-restart-relogin acceptance, so this is not production stable.

evidence.summary: Official REST reported v1.0.1.100619 and Steam build 24181105; the compatibility guard isolated the old loader and the Native named pipe was unavailable.

Two independent guarded builds reproduced the same 886272-byte protocol 1.1 read-only dev37-ro DLL after session-generation, absolute-deadline, and exact request-payload hash hardening, with Cargo locked and exact fetched dependency commits. The artifact is bound to the exact current PalServer executable but is not deployed, so it does not prove runtime compatibility.

combinations.notes: Unprobed read-only candidate. The old loader remains quarantined and the new artifact is not deployed. A controlled current-version runtime load plus schema/inventory probes is still required before producing p0-04-current-native-probe evidence; write capabilities remain disabled.
